phases.title: PHASE 1 Requirement Identification and Value Confirmation

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - 1 Consultant: Organize contract types and review point system
- 1 Agent Engineer: Design overall Agent and workflow structure

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: - Organize the complete workflow for industry project-level contract review
- Summarize dozens of contract types and hundreds of professional review points
- Define cross-contract associations and manual intervention nodes

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Related templates from this site, for reference only: [Preliminary Verification Requirements Document Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/PC8FwObgwiMwVPkM0i4cYkr2nYf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: - Business-side requirements specification document
- Industry attributes, target users, construction timeline
- Complete business workflow for project-level contract review
- Main pain points and value expectations
- Technical-side preliminary design specification
- Separation approach for element extraction and contract review
- Definition of key human-machine collaboration nodes
- Overall vision for rule library and workflow

subsections.title: Implementation Timeline
content: - 3 days

phases.title: PHASE 2 Preliminary Verification and Project Initiation (PoC)

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - 1 Consultant: Organize contract types and review point system
- 1 Agent Engineer: Design overall Agent and workflow structure

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: - Split into two independent workflows: "Element Extraction" and "Contract Review"
- Build a configurable review rule system
- Rule classification drives different workflow branches
- Introduce human-machine collaboration mechanisms to avoid model hallucinations

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Related templates from this site, for reference only: [Preliminary Verification Report Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/HKZGwXetBije9HklRQmcAe94nZE?from=from_copylink), [Project Initiation Report Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/R0jrwxeDfiBpsEkqZdYcZtgJncd?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: - Fully functional contract legal review Demo
- PoC verification report
- Review process feasibility
- Preliminary assessment of efficiency and accuracy
- Technical and business materials required for project initiation

subsections.title: Implementation Timeline
content: - 5-7 days

phases.title: PHASE 3 Official Launch and Iterative Optimization

subsections.title: Phase Overview
content: - The project enters the formal development and implementation phase. The focus is no longer on "whether it is feasible", but on continuous optimization around stability, scalability, and business adaptability.
- Implementation content as follows:
- Continuous expansion of contract types and review rules
- As the business progresses, continuously supplement new contract types and expand new review points within the existing rule system, ensuring smooth expansion without disrupting existing logic.
- Strengthen cross-contract and cross-material correlation analysis
- Support uploading auxiliary supporting documents and automatically correlate them with the main contract content for cross-validation, further improving review completeness in complex scenarios.
- Optimize review result presentation and traceability

- Provide side-by-side display of original text and risk points, highlight annotations, risk level differentiation, and annotated result downloads in the frontend interface, improving the user experience and result credibility for reviewers.
- Continuously optimize human-machine collaboration paths
- Based on actual usage feedback, refine the interaction methods for manual confirmation and intervention nodes, ensuring no additional burden while effectively controlling review risks.
